<?php /* * This file is part of the Predis package. * * (c) 2009-2020 Daniele Alessandri * (c) 2021-2025 Till Krüss * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Predis\Command\Redis; use Predis\Command\Command as RedisCommand; /** * @see http://redis.io/commands/type */ class TYPE extends RedisCommand { /** * {@inheritdoc} */ public function getId() { return 'TYPE'; } /** * {@inheritdoc} */ public function parseResponse($data) { if (is_string($data)) { return $data; } // Relay types switch ($data) { case 0: return 'none'; case 1: return 'string'; case 2: return 'set'; case 3: return 'list'; case 4: return 'zset'; case 5: return 'hash'; case 6: return 'stream'; default: return $data; } } }
